items.title: Resource suggestion: free offer negotiation follow-up generator
items.description:
Hi! I built a free no-login Offer Negotiation Follow-Up Generator that may fit job-search / career resource lists:

https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/offer-negotiation-follow-up-generator/

It drafts calm offer-stage emails for salary negotiation, written offer details, competing timelines, benefits questions, and asking for decision time. Related paid kit: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/job-interview-follow-up-kit/

Happy to adjust category/wording if useful.

items.title: New Feature Request: Adding an Event Page
items.description:
### Improvement

Adding a dedicated "Tech Events & Discovery Programs" page to the SimplifyJobs Summer2026-Internships repo is the ultimate way to capture the hidden recruiting pipeline.

For top-tier firms—especially in quantitative finance and big tech—programs like Explore HRT or Citadel Discover aren't just networking; they are fast-tracks straight to internship offers. However, these events are notoriously hard to track, dropping without warning and closing within days.

Centralizing them into a single, scannable list solves this visibility problem. It prevents students from missing critical early-career opportunities, levels the playing field for underrepresented applicants, and transforms the repository from a seasonal job tracker into a year-round career dashboard. It perfectly matches Simplify’s mission to make tech recruiting completely transparent.

items.title: New Feature Request: <feature>
items.description:
### Improvement

hi there , iam genuinely fascinated by this website and it's concept and easier way to apply for internships 
but many of the company present in repo are mostly USA or canada which is not possible to attend for people like me (From India).
what i would like to say is it would great if we can access the internship in our own country in this many students from outside of USA & CANADA can apply for internships and gain experience.Thanks in advance the repo is great in itself , i just thought something like this would be much better.
